title: sida rhombifolia
intro: Sida rhombifolia, also known as country mallow or buttonbush, is a plant species belonging to the Malvaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. It is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and skin issues, as well as to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine and Ayurvedic practices.
